why_this_is_the_moat: Best competitor stack covers 4 of the 5 buckets at most (Nansen has #1+#2 · Arkham has #1+#3 partial · TipRanks has #2+#4 partial · DeBank has #1+#5 partial). VERDICT is the only stack that joins ALL FIVE into ONE verified wallet rating with sha256 receipts at every join. The "joining" is the moat · not any single bucket.
output_form: One verdict per wallet · COPY/WATCH/AVOID/INSUFFICIENT · with the 5-bucket evidence panel under it · every bucket carrying a `verified by ↗` link to the source file in the public ledger.
